meta.title: FIR-2006: Fix maxUrls and timeLimit parameters in Deep Research API
meta.body_summary: Fix Deep Research API enforcement of maxUrls and timeLimit so crawling stops at user-specified URL and time bounds instead of over-running (e.g., 88 URLs when maxUrls=5, 400s when timeLimit=180).

perf_labels.notes: Devin fixed maxUrls/timeLimit enforcement with unit then e2e tests after mogery CHANGES_REQUESTED on mocked snips tests; merged ~30h later with core service change of 56 lines.

change_scale_vs_repository.interpretation: At 1115 changed lines, this is a medium-sized edit by absolute volume, though most churn is in test files rather than the 56-line service fix. It fits a targeted API resource-limit performance fix that merged after one round of test-structure review.

review_details.concern_detail: Maintainer mogery CHANGES_REQUESTED: mocked tests must not be added to the snips folder—only end-to-end tests are allowed. Devin replaced mocked tests with e2e tests and deleted the snips test files in follow-up commits.
review_details.performance_claim: Enforce maxUrls and timeLimit so Deep Research stops at user-configured URL and time budgets.

capability_boundary.boundary_notes: Service-layer limit enforcement and loop refactor are within typical API fix scope; merge hinged on aligning with repository test conventions rather than proving runtime speedup.

detection_detail.code_reading: mogery reviewed test placement policy via inline comment on the snips test file path.

maintainer_practices.reproducibility_notes: PR body cites concrete failure cases (88 URLs vs maxUrls=5, 400s vs timeLimit=180) and adds tests, but no benchmark or profiling evidence for runtime improvement.
maintainer_practices.regression_detail: After CHANGES_REQUESTED, Devin deleted mocked snips tests, added e2e coverage, and reverted an accidental lib.ts deletion within the same PR.

core_change_summary.description: In deep-research-service.ts, replaced async filter URL counting with a synchronous for-loop that enforces maxUrls immediately, extracted checkTimeLimit() for repeated timeLimit checks, and added debug logging for URL/time progress.
core_change_summary.secondary_note: Most line churn (729+330) came from added then removed/replaced test files under __tests__/snips; the production fix itself is ~56 changed lines.
change_trajectory: Initial commits: enforce maxUrls/timeLimit in service and add unit tests under snips.
CHANGES_REQUESTED: mogery rejected mocked tests in snips folder.
Follow-up: replaced with e2e tests, deleted snips test files; brief revert/delete cycle on lib.ts before final state.

review_signals.summary: Formal CHANGES_REQUESTED review with no body text; substantive feedback delivered via inline comment.
review_signals.action_taken: Devin reworked tests per inline guidance.

review_signals.summary: Mocked tests may not be added to the snips folder; only end-to-end tests are allowed.
review_signals.action_taken: Removed mocked snips tests and added e2e tests in subsequent commits.

review_signals.summary: Devin bot announced automatic comment/CI response for write-access users.

collaboration_trajectory: PR opened with service fix and initial snips tests; review requested same day.
~23 hours later mogery CHANGES_REQUESTED with inline test-folder policy feedback.
Devin iterated on tests over the next ~6 hours; merged by nickscamara after ~29.6 hours total.
